{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The text does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The novelty assessment is incomplete, as it only names one prior work and articulates a vague delta.",
    "R1.7": "The citation set is too thin to support either the novelty claim or the framing of 'existing methods'.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident; no marks for confidence or missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, with only two languages evaluated in the results section.",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors (inconsistent claims and lack of low-resource evaluation) and fabrications (overly broad novelty claim).",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability; no annotations for non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.5,
    "RX.4": 0.4,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The text does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty assessment is incomplete, as it only names one prior work and articulates a vague delta.
rationale.R1.7: The citation set is too thin to support either the novelty claim or the framing of 'existing methods'.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no marks for confidence or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, with only two languages evaluated in the results section.
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors (inconsistent claims and lack of low-resource evaluation) and fabrications (overly broad novelty claim).
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability; no annotations for non-cosmetic changes.
